name: Macadami Brittle
recipeIngredient: 1 cup Unsalted macadamia nuts, coarsely chopped (see note)
recipeInstructions:
1. Line the bottom and sides of a 9-inch round cake pan with aluminum foil.
Butter the foil generously.
2. Cook the macadamia nuts, butter, sugar, and corn syrup in a heavy large skillet
over low heat, stirring until the butter melts and the sugar dissolves.
3. Increase the heat and boil until the mixture turns golden brown and begins to
thicken, stirring constantly for about 5 minutes.
4. Pour the mixture into the prepared pan, spreading it evenly.
5. Sprinkle with chocolate chips; let melt and spread evenly over the top.
6. Cool for 15 minutes. Remove the candy from the pan and peel off the foil.
7. Cook completely. Break into pieces. Makes 1 pound.
(Suggestion: Cool the candy in the freezer or refrigerator before removing
the foil.)
Note: Unsalted Macadamia nuts can be obtained by gently rinsing them under running
water and patting them dry with a paper towel.
